title: Amogus Additions
description:
Amogus Additions, the peak of minecraft modding.

A homage to the craziness of Among Us. Most notably the memes.
body:
![Amogus logo of a crewmate standing on the moon looking at Earth](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Amogus_Additions/BH_AmogusA_header.webp)
Amogus Additions, the peak of minecraft modding.

A homage to the craziness of Among Us. Most notably the memes.

 (Requires GeckoLib for updates 8 and up)

 This mod adds Among Us themed things to Minecraft.

 ![A crewmate next to the word Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Amogus_Additions/BH_AmogusA_overview.webp)



Explore the world and encounter many things, such as Squishy Mogi, Ancient Temples, Elder Gods and Eldritch Horrors

Discord server - https://discord.gg/YcFDUKpU3D


![A crewmate on the moon with a bisecthosting logo on the left and a code on the right which says "DEVMULTIVERSE" for 25% off for a server](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Amogus_Additions/BH_AmogusA_promo.webp)


Official Partners With Bisect Hosting! use Code: DevMultiverse for 25% on your first Purchase





The team:
Quartzite: Creator, Lead Developer and assets
Lego245: Coding lead
Something Funky: Music
The Host: Assets and Music
Ranafangirl: Lead Assets and texturer
Mephilis: Moral coding support
